name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A thought from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled your subscription with Bright Smile Dental, and we just wanted to say thanks for the time you spent with us — no pressure, no hard feelings.

If your smile ever needs a little love again, here's 20% off to make coming back easy:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days and works on cleanings, consultations, or whatever you need at checkout.

If something about your experience didn't sit right, I'd honestly love to hear about it — just hit reply. I read every message personally, and we're always trying to make dental care feel a little less scary.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
